en.bridge.invalid_email_body: That doesn't look like a valid email. Go back and try again.
en.bridge.link_on_its_way: If you have an account, a one-click sign-in link is on its way to
en.bridge.links_expire_spam: Links expire in 15 minutes. Check spam if you don't see it.
en.bridge.couldnt_send: We couldn't send your link. Please try again in a minute.
en.bridge.we_sent_link: We sent a one-click sign-in link to
en.bridge.success_note: It expires in 15 minutes. Didn't get it? Check spam, or {link}.
